result.preview: "No results found in the provided databases: after scanning all publications, there were no non\u2013UNIV CALIFORNIA assignees whose citation lists included a patent publication assigned to UNIV CALIFORNIA (so no citing-assignee / primary-CPC-subclass-title pairs could be produced)."

args.answer: No results found in the provided databases: after scanning all publications, there were no non–UNIV CALIFORNIA assignees whose citation lists included a patent publication assigned to UNIV CALIFORNIA (so no citing-assignee / primary-CPC-subclass-title pairs could be produced).
